name: docs-mcp-server-starter
title: Docs MCP Server Starter
description: Persistent MCP server that gives Claude, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible AI assistant queryable access to technical documentation. Indexes any docs site, exposes search and fetch tools over JSON-RPC, and caches pages for fast follow-up queries. Ships with templates for Next.js, Tailwind CSS, React, TypeScript, and Prisma — or fork for any docs site with a URL and a CSS selector.
